name: Ocotillo Lookout
description: A soft-launch canvas stay meant for guests who want to be close to the landscape while accepting a lighter-touch hospitality footprint.
shortDescription: Coming-soon safari tent concept with sunrise views and shared field orientation.

photos.alt: Concept card for Ocotillo Lookout overlooking open desert

policies.cancellation: Policy will mirror flagship stay once released.
policies.pets: Not yet decided for soft launch.
policies.smoking: No smoking in guest or field structures.
policies.access: Final parking and path layout still under review.
policies.weather: Soft-launch inventory will open only in suitable weather windows.
